title: Tour of Salalah
summary: The Tour of Salalah is a multi-day road cycling race annually held in Oman. It has been part of the UCI Asia Tour since 2023 and is contested in September.
text:
The Tour of Salalah is a multi-day road cycling race annually held in Oman. It has been part of the UCI Asia Tour since 2023 and is contested in September.
